# Chor Ratchawat Muay Thai Gym

> Muay Thai training camp in Koh Samui, Thailand with two locations in Bo Phut and Plai Laem. Family-run gym rated 5.0/5 on Google with 396 verified reviews across both camps.

## About

Chor Ratchawat (ช.รัชวาทย์) is a family-run Muay Thai camp on Koh Samui island in the Gulf of Thailand. Founded and operated by Thai trainers with decades of professional fighting experience, we welcome all levels — from complete beginners to competitive fighters.

We operate two locations:
- **Bo Phut Camp**: An intimate, authentic street gym in the heart of Fisherman's Village, Bo Phut. Ideal for focused 1-on-1 training and small groups.
- **Plai Laem Camp**: Our larger, fully-equipped facility near Big Buddha. Features a full-size ring, heavy bags, speed bags, and conditioning area.

Our trainers hold professional Muay Thai records and have trained fighters across Thailand's major stadiums. Training runs 6 days a week (closed Sunday), with group classes at 9:00–10:30 and 17:00–18:30, and private lessons in 1-hour slots from 7:00 to 17:00 (outside group class hours).

We hold a perfect 5.0 out of 5 star rating on Google at both camps: 255 reviews at Bo Phut and 141 at Plai Laem, for a total of 396 verified reviews. Students repeatedly mention patient trainers, beginner-friendly classes, clean facilities, and a welcoming international community.

## Programs

### Group Classes
Join our morning (9:00–10:30) or evening (17:00–18:30) group sessions, six days a week. Classes cover pad work, bag work, clinch technique, conditioning, and sparring. All levels welcome. Maximum 8–10 students per session for personal attention.

### Private 1-on-1 Training
Book a dedicated session with one of our trainers. Fully customized to your level, goals, and interests — whether technique refinement, fight preparation, or fitness. Sessions last 60–90 minutes. Available throughout the day by appointment.

### Kids Muay Thai
Group classes for children ages 8–13, available at both locations. Younger kids (ages 3–7) train through private sessions (1-on-1 or small group, 3 kids max). Focus on discipline, coordination, basic Muay Thai technique, and fitness in a safe, encouraging environment.

### Fighter Training
9,500 THB per month at our Plai Laem camp only (not offered at Bo Phut). Structured preparation with strict schedule: morning run at 7:30 into training through 10:00, and afternoon from 16:00 to 18:30, six days a week. Includes advanced pad work, sparring, clinch work, kettlebell and conditioning (2–3x per week), fight strategy, fight organization, and corner support on fight night. Fighters keep 100% of their fight purse with no camp commission. Ratchawat fighters have competed at Rajadamnern Stadium, One Lumpinee, and RWS. Fighter + Standard Room 20,000 THB/month; Fighter + Private Bungalow 25,500 THB/month (electricity separate).

## Services

### Accommodation
We partner with local guesthouses and hostels near both camps to offer affordable accommodation for training visitors. Options range from basic fan rooms to air-conditioned studios. Ask us for current availability and rates.

### DTV Visa Support
We provide official documentation and invitation letters for the Destination Thailand Visa (DTV), which allows stays of up to 180 days (initial 60 days + 60-day extension + additional 60-day extension). Our staff assists with the application process.

### Transport
Free pickup from Nathon Pier or Koh Samui Airport for students booking weekly or monthly packages. We can also arrange motorbike and scooter rentals.

### Gear & Equipment
Basic training gear (gloves, shin guards, hand wraps) is available for use at both camps. We also sell quality Muay Thai gear on-site.

### Insurance
We recommend and can help arrange travel and sports insurance coverage suitable for Muay Thai training. Required for sparring sessions.

## Pricing

| Package | Price |
|---|---|
| Drop-in (single session) | 500 THB |
| 5-session pack | 2,000 THB |
| 10-session pack | 3,500 THB |
| 1 week unlimited | 2,500 THB |
| 2 weeks unlimited | 4,500 THB |
| 1 month unlimited | 5,500 THB |
| Private session (1 hour) | 1,000 THB |
| Private session (5-pack) | 4,000 THB |
| Kids (per session) | 400 THB |
| Kids (monthly) | 3,500 THB |

All prices in Thai Baht (THB). Discounts available for long-term stays. Payment accepted: cash, bank transfer, credit card.

- [Kids Muay Thai](https://ratchawatmuaythai.com/programs/kids): Children's Muay Thai classes ages 6–14
- [Fighter Training](https://ratchawatmuaythai.com/programs/fighter-training): Competitive fighter preparation program
- [Bo Phut Camp](https://ratchawatmuaythai.com/camps/bo-phut): Our intimate street gym in Fisherman's Village
- [Plai Laem Camp](https://ratchawatmuaythai.com/camps/plai-laem): Our larger facility near Big Buddha

- [Accommodation](https://ratchawatmuaythai.com/accommodation): Nearby lodging options for training visitors
- [DTV Visa](https://ratchawatmuaythai.com/visa/dtv): Destination Thailand Visa support and documentation
- [Reviews](https://ratchawatmuaythai.com/reviews): Student testimonials and ratings

- [Contact](https://ratchawatmuaythai.com/contact): Phone, email, maps, and directions
- [Privacy Policy](https://ratchawatmuaythai.com/privacy): Data and privacy policy

## Locations

### Bo Phut Camp
- **Address**: Soi Sunday Tambon Bo Put, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani 84320, Thailand
- **Area**: Bo Phut / Fisherman's Village
- **Character**: Intimate street gym, authentic atmosphere
- **Hours**: Monday–Saturday (closed Sunday). Group: 9:00–10:30, 17:00–18:30. Private: 1h slots 7:00–17:00.

### Plai Laem Camp
- **Address**: 20, 33 หมู่ที่ 5 ปลายแหลม ซอย 13, Tambon Bo Put, Amphoe Ko Samui, Surat Thani 84320, Thailand
- **Area**: Plai Laem / near Big Buddha
- **Character**: Larger facility with full-size ring and complete equipment
- **Hours**: Monday–Saturday (closed Sunday). Group: 9:00–10:30, 17:00–18:30. Private: 1h slots 7:00–17:00.
